maxRules: You can add up to {max, number} allowlist rules
ruleMoved: This rule changed while you were editing. Please try again.
description: Only models matching these rules can be routed to this provider.
exactPickerDescription: Prefer upstream models when available. If not, fall back to the local price list and add them as exact-match rules.
emptyState: No allowlist rules yet. When empty, all models are allowed.
patternTooLong: Match pattern is too long (max {max} characters)
regexUnsafe: Regex pattern has potential ReDoS risk
quickAddMissingUrl: Provider URL is required before quick add
quickAddMissingKey: API key is required before quick add
quickAddReachedLimit: Reached the {max, number}-rule limit while importing upstream models
quickAddNoNewRules: No new upstream models were added
